name: Hummus with Warm Pita
description: Ultra-creamy classic hummus from chickpeas, tahini, garlic and lemon — a make-ahead mezze served with warm pita.
recipeInstructions: For the creamiest hummus, simmer the chickpeas with baking soda and rub off the skins (or use quality canned).
In a food processor, blend the chickpeas until powdery, then stream in tahini, lemon juice, garlic, salt, and 2 ice cubes; process 4-5 minutes until silky, adding a little water if needed.
Spread in a bowl, drizzle generously with olive oil, dust with sumac, and serve with warm pita.
author: The Mediterranean Dish

ai.cliffNotes: Peeled chickpeas, a couple ice cubes, and a long blend make ultra-creamy hummus.
keyTips: Peel the cooked chickpeas — the real secret to smooth (not rustic) hummus.
Drop in a couple ice cubes while blending for a fluffy, ice-cream-like texture.
Process a full 4-5 minutes — don't stop early or it stays grainy.
